description.text: You enter a grand chamber. Sunlight streams in from a crack in the ceiling — and beneath it, the mysterious stranger stands very still, listening. Voices echo down the stairwells. They are not far behind you now.

You enter a grand chamber. Sunlight streams in from a crack in the ceiling. The mysterious stranger near the exit glances past you, toward the way you came — somewhere back there, something is moving.

You enter a grand chamber. Sunlight streams in from a crack in the ceiling. A mysterious stranger stands near the exit — and now that you've noticed it, you can't unsee the faint shimmer of something lodged high in the ceiling crack.
You enter a grand chamber. Sunlight streams in from a crack in the ceiling. A mysterious stranger stands near the exit.

passiveChecks.text: Something up in the ceiling crack catches the light — just for a heartbeat.

skills.text: Climb toward the shimmer in the ceiling crack.

success.text: Fingers wedged in the crack, you work the thing loose: an orb that blinks against your palm.

failure.text: You get a hand on it — then your grip goes. You land hard, but your fist stays closed around the prize.

actions.log: The fall knocks the wind out of you. (-3 HP)
